meaning: n.客人,来宾,旅客vt.招待,款待vi.作客,寄宿
examples: She was a guest at the wedding.
Prior to joining CNN, Smerconish was an MSNBC contributor and frequent guest-host of Hardball for Chris Matthews.
Guest suites are some of the city's largest, with hardwood floors, cushioned headboards and striking artwork throughout.
